stemHtml: The phase angle of a wave is…

options.a: The angle of the modulation on a wavelength expressed in degrees from 000° to 360°.
options.b: The position of a modulation on a wavelength expressed in degrees from 000° to 360°.
options.c: The deflection on a wave expressed in degrees from 000° to 360°.
options.d: The fraction of one wavelength expressed in degrees from 000° to 360°.
